枚举类 HttpStatusEnum.Series

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<HttpStatusEnum.Series>
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.Series
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable, Comparable<HttpStatusEnum.Series>, Constable
封闭类:
HttpStatusEnum
public static enum HttpStatusEnum.Series extends Enum<HttpStatusEnum.Series>
Enumeration of HTTP status series.

Retrievable via HttpStatusEnum.series().

从以下版本开始:
3.0

  • 方法详细资料

    • values

      public static HttpStatusEnum.Series[] values()
      返回包含该枚举类的常量的数组， 顺序与声明这些常量的顺序相同
      返回:
      包含该枚举类的常量的数组，顺序与声明这些常量的顺序相同

    • valueOf

      public static HttpStatusEnum.Series valueOf(String name)
      返回带有指定名称的该类的枚举常量。 字符串必须与用于声明该类的枚举常量的 标识符完全匹配。（不允许有多余 的空格字符。）
      参数:
      name - 要返回的枚举常量的名称。
      返回:
      返回带有指定名称的枚举常量
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - 如果该枚举类没有带有指定名称的常量
      NullPointerException - 如果参数为空值

    • value

      public int value()
      Return the integer value of this status series. Ranges from 1 to 5.
      返回:
      the integer value

    • valueOf

      @Deprecated public static HttpStatusEnum.Series valueOf(HttpStatusEnum status)
      已过时。
      as of 5.3, in favor of invoking HttpStatusEnum.series() directly
      Return the Series enum constant for the supplied HttpStatus.
      参数:
      status - a standard HTTP status enum constant
      返回:
      the Series enum constant for the supplied HttpStatus

    • valueOf

      public static HttpStatusEnum.Series valueOf(int statusCode)
      Return the Series enum constant for the supplied status code.
      参数:
      statusCode - the HTTP status code (potentially non-standard)
      返回:
      the Series enum constant for the supplied status code
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum has no corresponding constant

    • resolve

      public static HttpStatusEnum.Series resolve(int statusCode)
      Resolve the given status code to an HttpStatus.Series, if possible.
      参数:
      statusCode - the HTTP status code (potentially non-standard)
      返回:
      the corresponding Series, or null if not found
      从以下版本开始:
      5.1.3
